title: Upon His Verses.
content:
What offspring other men have got,
    The how, where, when, I question not.
    These are the children I have left,
    Adopted some, none got by theft;
    But all are touch'd, like lawful plate,
    And no verse illegitimate.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon His Verses."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
